title: Lab 4 — Cluster Upgrade with kubeadm
description: Upgrade a Kubernetes cluster from v1.30 to v1.31 using kubeadm, following the recommended order: control plane first, then workers.

steps.title: Step 2: Upgrade the kubeadm binary on the control plane
Step 3: Plan and apply on the control plane
Step 5: Upgrade kubelet and kubectl on the control plane
